Package com.govsim.govsim.simulation

package com.govsim.govsim.simulation
  • Class
    Description
    AIAdvisor
    AI Advisor — connects to Groq API and returns DecisionOption arrays: 1.
    AnnualReview
    Annual minister review — evaluate and keep/fire
    EventGenerator
    SP1 — Generates random daily events for each ministry
    EventRouter
    SP2 — Routes each Event to the correct Ministry
    ReportGenerator
     
    SimuEngine
    Main simulation engine — console game loop
    SimuEngineGUI
    GUI simulation engine — extends SimuEngine with GUI support
    SimuEngineGUI.SimulationListener
     
    UserManager
    Handles user authentication (login/register)
